---
title: "Schedule"
---

{{< meta course.semester >}}, starting {{< meta course.start-date >}}.

Linked sessions are available now. Unlinked ones are listed so you can see
what is coming; they go online in the week they are taught.

| Week | Lecture | Practical |
|------|---------|-----------|
| 1 | [Sequence Alignment](lectures/01-alignment/index.qmd) | [Pairwise Alignment](practicals/01-alignment/index.qmd) |
| 2 | Sequence Databases | Database Searching |
| 3 | TODO | TODO |

: Course schedule {tbl-colwidths="[10,45,45]"}

::: {.callout-note}
Dates come from `_course.yml`. Rolling the course into a new semester means
editing that one file, not this table.
:::

<!--
MAINTENANCE: only link a session once it is in the render allowlist in
_quarto.yml. Linking a held-back session produces a 404, which
scripts/check-links.sh will fail on in CI. Run ./scripts/release.sh status
to see what is currently live.
-->
